ai.centerHeroTitle: Explore the limitless possibilities of artificial intelligence
ai.centerHeroDesc: Through immersive AI practice projects, from generative AI to machine learning, build your digital innovation capabilities in every direction.
ai.aigcDesc: A creative content production approach that uses artificial intelligence models to automatically generate text, images, audio, and video, inspiring creativity.
ai.behaviorDesc: By analyzing body posture, movement trajectories, and action sequences, AI is able to “understand human behavior.”

handwrittenPage.heroDesc: Explore one of the foundations of computer vision and see how AI learns to recognize, classify, and understand handwritten digits. Start from the dataset and step into the logic of neural networks.

whatIs.title: What Is MNIST
whatIs.desc: MNIST (Modified National Institute of Standards and Technology) is one of the most well-known benchmark datasets in computer vision. It contains 70,000 grayscale images of handwritten digits, each sized at 28×28 pixels. Because it is well-structured and lightweight to compute, MNIST is widely regarded as the “Hello World” of AI and deep learning.

vector.title: Image Vectorization
vector.desc: The 28×28 image is flattened or fed directly into the model so that multi-layer convolutional networks can learn meaningful features.

feature.title: Feature Extraction
feature.desc: Convolution layers automatically learn spatial features such as edges and shapes, while pooling layers downsample the data to improve robustness.

output.title: Classification Output
output.desc: Fully connected layers map the extracted features to the output layer, and Softmax predicts the probability of each digit from 0 to 9.

handwrittenWorkbench.title: MNIST Handwritten Digit Recognition Workbench
handwrittenWorkbench.desc: A real-time handwritten digit recognition demo powered by convolutional neural networks (CNN). Experience how machine learning interprets human handwriting through an interactive canvas.
handwrittenWorkbench.uploadBadge: Upload a handwritten digit image for recognition
handwrittenWorkbench.cameraBadge: Capture a single handwritten digit for recognition
handwrittenWorkbench.uploadHint: Supports PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WEBP handwritten digit images
handwrittenWorkbench.uploadGuide: For best results, upload a clear image containing only one digit. Icons or complex pictures will not produce reliable predictions.
handwrittenWorkbench.cameraHint: Camera capture and real-time recognition can be connected here later

errors.cameraUnavailable: Camera recognition is not connected yet
errors.recognitionFailed: Recognition failed. Please try again later.
errors.modelMissing: Local model file was not found. Please place mnist.onnx in the public/models directory.

ai.languageDesc: Through technologies such as speech recognition and text understanding and generation, machines are able to “listen, speak, and read.”
ai.mlDesc: A core technology that enables AI to continuously become smarter by learning from data.
ai.pageTitle: Your personal AI learning and creative toolbox

poseIntroPage.heroDesc: Precisely detect and track 17 core human keypoints to build a live motion skeleton in real time. It is widely used in sports teaching analysis, dance assessment, and rehabilitation monitoring to make body movement digital and visible.
poseIntroPage.startSoon: The pose recognition experience is being connected.

teaching.title: Sports Motion Correction
teaching.desc: Analyze movements such as long jump, running, or shooting in real time and help teachers provide more scientific posture improvement guidance through angle-based evaluation.

sports.title: Dance Teaching Assessment
sports.desc: Compare student movement against standard dance poses from expert instructors, and digitally evaluate balance, extension, and rhythm for more standardized dance teaching.

performance.title: Rehabilitation Training Monitoring
performance.desc: Monitor patient range of motion, automatically record training frequency and movement compliance, and assist doctors in evaluating recovery progress.

ai.visionDesc: Through technologies such as image recognition, object detection, and scene analysis, computers gain the ability to “understand the world.”
ai.imageClassModelDesc: Use camera or upload images for classification training;
ai.voiceClassModelDesc: Use microphone for voice classification training;
ai.poseClassModelDesc: Recognize body poses for classification training;
ai.createNewModelDesc: Start a new model project from scratch.

code.title: Coding Assistant

analysis.title: AI Learning Analytics

tools.vincibotDesc: Provides AI model training, block-based programming, and Python text programming to support students of different ages. Built-in AI, camera, and music features create a fun learning experience.
tools.nousDesc: An advanced AI programming learning platform that deeply combines block-based programming and Python with rich AI features, camera, sensors, and multi-sensory interaction.
tools.talemapDesc: A story map design platform where users can create unlimited interactive maps and scenes, blending programming with narrative art.

tool.heroDesc: Integrated smart teaching tools combine software and hardware to explore the limitless possibilities of future education and turn every idea into reality.

matatacode.desc: Provides both block-based and icon-based programming to meet the cognitive development and learning needs of students of different ages. Programs can be run and verified in a virtual environment through the built-in simulator, improving flexibility and hands-on learning.
matatacode.title: An application that provides control and programming for Tale-Bot Pro and Coding Set.

matataxplore.desc: Provides a professional, convenient, and fun microscope experience, stimulating children’s curiosity and interest in science, suitable for various educational environments and nature exploration activities.
matataxplore.title: A microscope operation software designed specifically for children, helping them easily explore the microscopic world.

nous.desc: Provides AI model training, block-based programming, and Python text programming to meet students’ cognitive levels and learning needs of different ages. Based on hardware functions, it offers various fun programming experiences including AI, blocks, cameras, sensors, and musical instruments, with teaching cases and a help center to assist students in quick mastery.
nous.title: An application that provides control, programming, and embedded machine learning functions for Nous.

tool.pageTitle: Your personal AI learning and creative toolbox

talemap.desc: The software includes two main features: designing your story map and a story map gallery, allowing users to easily create unlimited interactive maps and scenes.
talemap.title: MatataCode (TaleMap) is software designed for Tale-Bot Pro.

vincibot.desc: Provides AI model training, block-based programming, and Python text programming to meet students’ cognitive levels and learning needs of different ages. Based on hardware functions, it offers various fun programming experiences including AI, cameras, sensors, musical instruments, with teaching cases and a help center to assist students in quick mastery.
vincibot.title: An application that provides control, programming, and embedded machine learning functions for VinciBot.

taskManagement.description1: Select the corresponding course or creation tool, push it to the student/group side to open, and complete the corresponding task;

faceDemo.heroDesc: Powered by cutting-edge deep learning algorithms, enabling millisecond-level student identification and management. Providing seamless attendance, secure access control, and classroom engagement analysis.
faceDemo.name: Name
faceDemo.faceDataCollectionDesc: Quickly collect face data by uploading images or using the camera
faceDemo.greetingMsg: Hello {name}, please choose your face enrollment method

faceDemo.enrollTip3: Capture the clearest possible headshot for each person

faceDemo.faceIntroDesc: Face recognition is a biometric technology based on AI and computer vision. It captures face images for detection, feature extraction, and matching to achieve identity recognition or verification. The system extracts key features from faces and converts them into data for comparison. With deep learning advances, recognition accuracy continues to improve under varying lighting, angles, and complex environments.
faceDemo.uploadFormatHint:
Supports JPG, PNG formats
Batch selection available
faceDemo.cameraFeatureHint:
Real-time video capture
AI auto-extracts facial features
faceDemo.uploadCaptureNote: Upload a clear front-facing photo; the system will auto-extract facial features
faceDemo.cameraCaptureNote: Align your face within the frame and ensure good lighting
faceDemo.uploadFormatSuggestion: Supports JPG/PNG formats; single front-facing photo recommended
faceDemo.enrollSuccessHint: Continue enrolling more samples or proceed to recognition

aiwenda.defaultSuggestion2: What new changes are there in 2025 provincial college entrance admission policies?
aiwenda.defaultSuggestion3: How should I arrange a full-year preparation plan for Postgraduate English I?

aiwenda.analyzeAttachment: Please help me analyze this attachment

aiwenda.historySampleTitle2: What kind of teacher are you?

music.heroDesc: Powered by advanced neural networks, providing comprehensive song creation support. Whether you're a professional songwriter or a beginner, you can quickly build a complete work's style, lyrics, and emotional expression here.
music.promptCardDesc: Describe the music style, scene, or mood in one sentence, and AI will generate creative direction accordingly.
music.promptFieldLabel: Describe the music style or mood you want
music.promptPlaceholder: e.g. A fast-paced electronic track blending cyberpunk style, with deep bass and crisp synth sounds, evoking solitude and hope in a neon-lit rainy city...
music.lyricsCardDesc: Enter manually, or leave blank for AI to auto-complete based on the description.
music.songNamePlaceholder: Give your work a great name
music.lyricsPlaceholder: Enter your lyrics, or click AI Auto Lyrics above...
music.generateHint: AI will generate song structure drafts, demo melody, and style suggestions
music.paramsDesc: The more specific your choices, the closer the result will match your expectations.
music.demoLyricLine1: Rain falls on the city's edge
music.demoLyricLine3: I follow the beat through the crowd
music.demoLyricLine4: Turning loneliness into a new direction
music.lyric6: The ultimate fusion of code and melody
music.lyric9: When computing power becomes dancing notes
music.lyric10: We shall transcend the barriers of logic

story.heroDesc: Unleash your imagination — build epic sagas or heartwarming fairy tales in just a few simple steps.
story.personalizeDesc: Configure your characters, scenes, and plot to set the tone for your unique story.
story.customRolePlaceholder: e.g. A star miner lost in time...
story.customScenePlaceholder: Describe a unique scene, e.g. a steampunk city floating in the clouds...
story.storyDescPlaceholder: Briefly describe your story outline or core conflict. Our AI will build the story around it...
story.enterReadingFailed: Failed to enter story reading page. Please try again later.
story.congratsTitle: Congratulations! You completed an amazing story
story.congratsDesc: You have successfully turned your creative ideas into a complete story. Now you can save your work, download the e-book, or continue expanding with new chapters.
story.continueChapterDesc: Tell the AI assistant your creative blueprint, and we will help you build a more exciting plot
story.nextChapterPlaceholder: e.g. Allen meets a mysterious guardian inside the stone tower, and they debate about the truth...
story.editDescPlaceholder: e.g. Make the story more sci-fi, or add a dialogue between the protagonist and a mysterious character.
story.defaultOutline: In a mysterious star academy, an ordinary student accidentally triggers the power of ruins sealed for a thousand years, and is drawn into an adventure that will decide the academy's fate.
story.storyParagraph1: {protagonist} was once the most inconspicuous {role} on the edge of {scene}, until a faintly glowing badge lit up on its own under the moonlight. It seemed to be calling, or reminding — making {protagonist} realize they were being drawn into a grand mystery related to {keywords}.
story.storyParagraph2: Following the blue trail cast by the badge, {protagonist} entered a long-sealed corridor. The murals on both sides kept changing, as if reenacting secrets from a distant era. With every step forward, {protagonist} became more certain that the real challenge was not the external darkness, but the inner hesitation and choice toward the unknown.
story.storyParagraph3Fallback: A {role} named {protagonist} embarked on an adventure about {keywords} in {scene}.
story.storyParagraph4: As the last door slowly opened, the truth hidden deep within {scene} finally revealed itself. {protagonist} chose not to retreat, but instead pieced the puzzle together into a complete answer with newfound courage. The story pauses here, but new clues have quietly been left behind, waiting for the next chapter to unfold.
story.version3Desc: Enhanced the atmosphere of the star academy and added sound details for badge resonance.
story.version2Desc: Added clues left by Lin Xiao's father, making the backstory more suspenseful.
story.continueOutlineDefault: Expanding around new clues in {scene}, highlighting the choices and conflicts {protagonist} is about to face.
story.editPromptDefault: Make the story more suspenseful, and strengthen the conflict between the protagonist and the mysterious guardian.
story.book1: Secret Code of the Star Academy
story.inputNextChapterPlot: Please enter the core plot for the next chapter first
story.selectAtLeastOneKeyword: Please select at least one plot keyword
story.inputEditDescFirst: Please enter a modification description first
story.nextChapterReserved: Next chapter entry reserved. You can continue expanding the writing flow.

objectRecognition.introDesc1: An application based on AI and computer vision technology that performs feature extraction and analysis on objects in images or videos to automatically identify and classify items. It relies on deep learning models, especially convolutional neural networks, to accurately recognize various everyday objects.
objectRecognition.introDesc2: This technology is widely used in smart security, unmanned retail, autonomous driving, educational interaction, and other scenarios, enhancing information processing efficiency and providing crucial support for intelligent applications.
objectRecognition.matchDesc: Extracted features are compared with local pre-trained models to determine the category and attributes of supported objects through probability calculation.
objectRecognition.workflowDesc: From sample collection to model inference, helping students understand the complete image recognition pipeline.
objectRecognition.stepDataCollectionDesc: Supports high-precision image collection with multi-dimensional feature labeling and classification management, providing high-quality training samples for models.
objectRecognition.stepModelTrainingDesc: Trains deep learning models based on collected datasets using convolutional neural network architectures for precise object feature extraction.
objectRecognition.stepRecognitionResultDesc: Instantly matches through local models, outputting the names and corresponding confidence scores of supported objects.
objectRecognition.emptyHint: Start detecting to experience the model
objectRecognition.browserNotSupportCamera: Your browser does not support camera access
objectRecognition.openCameraFailed: Cannot open camera. Please check browser permissions.
objectRecognition.cameraNotReady: Camera feed is not ready. Please try again later.
objectRecognition.onlyBrowserSupported: Object recognition only runs in browser environments
objectRecognition.imageLoadFailed: Image failed to load, unable to recognize
objectRecognition.detectFailed: Detection failed. Please try again later.

graffitiRecognition.heroDesc: Explore how artificial intelligence crosses the visual gap, transforming simple strokes and abstract doodles into deep semantic understanding and opening a new dimension of machine vision.
graffitiRecognition.whatIsDesc1: Doodle recognition is a unique branch of computer vision. Unlike recognizing real-world photos, doodle recognition faces extremely high abstraction and subjectivity. By leveraging massive datasets such as Quick, Draw! with millions of samples, we can train deep neural networks to understand the simplified ways humans capture the essence of objects.
graffitiRecognition.whatIsDesc2: The order, direction, and position of every stroke are treated as important feature vectors. The machine is no longer just looking at pixels, but understanding the creation process itself.

graffitiWorkbench.title: Doodle Recognition Workbench
graffitiWorkbench.desc: Draw in real time and experience how a convolutional neural network (CNN) recognizes hundreds of everyday doodles in milliseconds.
graffitiWorkbench.canvasHint: Draw any shape in the whiteboard area
graffitiWorkbench.probabilityEmpty: The model Top 5 results will appear automatically after you start drawing
graffitiWorkbench.tipText: Recognition looks off? Thin strokes or background noise may affect the result. Click Reset Canvas and redraw with smoother lines.
graffitiWorkbench.pendingDesc: The Start Experience button now lands here. The next step is to implement the sliders, canvas, and recognition result panel from the Stitch design.

turingPage.heroDesc: Uncover one of the oldest and most important evaluation standards in artificial intelligence. Starting from Alan Turing's “Imitation Game”, explore the intersection of cognitive science and machine intelligence.
turingPage.coreConceptsDesc: Understand the theoretical foundations and evaluation dimensions behind the Turing Test.
turingPage.agiImageAlt: Concept illustration of general artificial intelligence

imitationGame.title: Imitation Game
imitationGame.desc: The original form of the Turing Test. A human evaluator talks through pure text with two participants, one human and one machine. If the evaluator cannot reliably tell which one is the machine, the machine is considered to have passed.

cognitiveBlindSpots.title: Cognitive Blind Spots
cognitiveBlindSpots.desc: Explore the limits of behaviorism in evaluating intelligence, and the difference between language performance and true intelligence.

languageFluency.title: Language Fluency
languageFluency.desc: How machines simulate human emotion, humor, and informal conversational styles.

agiPath.title: The Path to AGI
agiPath.desc: Modern Turing-style evaluation goes beyond dialogue into vision, reasoning, and cross-domain knowledge integration, becoming a milestone on the path toward AGI.

turingWorkbench.title: Intelligent Judgement Workbench

analysis.title: Answer Analysis
analysis.intro: Let's go through the answer analysis together!

result.successDesc: In this round, you accurately noticed the logical gaps hidden in the robot's dialogue.
result.failDesc: The AI successfully misled your judgment. Don't worry, AI evolves faster than expected, and you'll catch it next time.

turingWorkbench.loadFailed: Failed to load questions, please try again later
turingWorkbench.submitFailed: Submission failed, please try again later

moodPage.title: Emotion Recognition
moodPage.description: Powered by deep convolutional neural networks and the Facial Action Coding System, it captures subtle movements around the eyes, lips, and brows to map core emotions such as joy, anger, sadness, and fear.

education.title: Smart Education
education.desc: Analyze classroom attention and learning emotions to support differentiated teaching. Emotional feedback helps adjust teaching rhythm and enables personalized growth.

mental.title: Mental Wellness
mental.desc: Assist with stress monitoring and emotional guidance. Long-term emotion trend tracking helps surface potential mental health risks earlier and strengthens campus support.

interaction.title: Intelligent Interaction
interaction.desc: Give robots and AI assistants the ability to perceive human emotion, creating more empathetic conversations and a warmer, more realistic interaction experience.

moodWorkbench.multiFaceHint: The current frontend-only version focuses on the primary face first. Multi-face parallel recognition can be added next.
moodWorkbench.uploadPlaceholder: Upload a clear face photo to start recognition
moodWorkbench.uploadLoadFailed: Failed to load image, please choose another one
moodWorkbench.cameraInitFailed: Camera initialization failed, please check browser permission
moodWorkbench.imageDetecting: Analyzing facial expression in the image...
moodWorkbench.noFaceInUpload: No clear face was detected in the uploaded image
moodWorkbench.noFaceDetected: No clear face detected in the current frame
moodWorkbench.faceDetected: Face detected and recognition result updated
moodWorkbench.landmarkFailed: Face detected, but landmark extraction failed
moodWorkbench.detectFailed: Recognition failed, please try again later

ttsDemo.introDesc: Text-to-Speech (TTS) is an AI technology that automatically converts text into speech, serving as a fundamental capability in voice interaction and smart education. In educational settings, TTS not only helps students 'hear knowledge' but also enhances learning experience and comprehension through multilingual reading, expressive delivery, and personalized speed adjustment.
ttsDemo.modelStatusReady: Online preview and MP3 download are ready.
ttsDemo.stepTextPreprocessingDesc: Normalizes input text, identifies special symbols, numbers, and abbreviations, and performs accurate word segmentation.
ttsDemo.stepFeatureExtractionDesc: Analyzes deep semantic information and contextual relationships to extract key linguistic features for speech generation.
ttsDemo.stepPhonemeConversionDesc: Uses pronunciation dictionaries or neural network models to precisely convert processed text sequences into corresponding phoneme symbols.
ttsDemo.stepProsodyModelingDesc: Predicts pauses, stress, intonation, and speech rate to give synthesized speech natural human emotional expression.
ttsDemo.stepAcousticModelingDesc: Maps linguistic features to acoustic parameters such as Mel spectrograms via neural networks, building the foundation of speech signals.
ttsDemo.stepVocoderDesc: Uses high-performance neural vocoders to convert acoustic parameters into high-quality audio streams, producing natural and clear speech.
ttsDemo.textareaPlaceholder: Enter the text you want to convert... For best results, keep paragraphs coherent and use proper punctuation.
ttsDemo.onlyTxtSupported: Only TXT or Markdown text files are supported
ttsDemo.importTruncated: Text imported. Content exceeding 5000 characters has been truncated.
ttsDemo.importFailed: Text import failed. Please ensure the file is UTF-8 encoded.
ttsDemo.voiceNotAvailable: {name} local model is not yet available
ttsDemo.playbackFailed: Playback failed. Please try again later.
ttsDemo.pleaseInputText: Please enter text to synthesize first
ttsDemo.synthesisFailed: Speech synthesis failed. Please try again later.
ttsDemo.downloadNoText: Please enter text to download first
ttsDemo.downloadFailed: Audio generation failed. Please try again later.

asrDemo.introDesc: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) is an AI technology that automatically recognizes and converts human speech into text, making classroom recording, voice search, oral training, and teaching content archiving more efficient.
asrDemo.stepAudioCollectionDesc: Collects speech signals from a microphone or audio source, performing basic noise reduction, gain adjustment, and segmentation.
asrDemo.stepFeatureExtractionDesc: Converts continuous sound waves into time-frequency features for model recognition, preserving key pronunciation information.
asrDemo.stepAcousticModelingDesc: Analyzes audio features through neural networks to determine which phonemes or word candidates each speech segment matches.
asrDemo.stepLanguageDecodingDesc: Combines context and language models to rank and correct candidate results, generating coherent and readable text.
asrDemo.stepRealtimeOutputDesc: Displays interim recognition results and final transcribed text in real time for classroom recording and follow-up organization.
asrDemo.stepResultArchiveDesc: Recognition results can be copied, organized, or used for teaching analysis, content archiving, and knowledge retrieval.
asrDemo.langChineseHint: Currently using the Chinese Vosk model, suitable for Mandarin classroom lectures, interviews, and discussions.
asrDemo.langEnglishHint: Current mode uses the English Vosk model and works best for lectures, dialogue, and read-aloud audio.
asrDemo.recordPlaybackHint: Recording playback is for preview only and will not trigger transcription. To transcribe, click 'Transcribe Recording' below.
asrDemo.uploadFormatHint: Supports MP3 / WAV / M4A / WebM. Files can be transcribed locally in the browser after upload.
asrDemo.uploadReadyHint: Audio file loaded. Click the button below to start offline transcription.
asrDemo.statusRealtimeTranscribing: Real-time transcription in progress. Please speak into the microphone.
asrDemo.statusRecordDone: Recording done: {name}. You can preview first, then transcribe manually.
asrDemo.statusIdleRecord: Click to start real-time transcription. A local audio file will be generated after stopping.
asrDemo.realtimeHint: Real-time transcription outputs preview text while recording. After stopping, a 16k WAV file is generated. The player is for playback only; transcription must be triggered manually.
asrDemo.transcribingRealtime: Real-time transcription in progress. Keep microphone input steady...
asrDemo.emptyUploadNoModel: Please load the language model first, then upload an audio file to start transcription.
asrDemo.emptyUploadReady: No transcript yet. Upload a local audio file and click Start Transcription.
asrDemo.emptyRecordDone: Recording complete. The player is for playback only. To transcribe, click 'Transcribe Recording'. Real-time preview is for reference during recording.
asrDemo.emptyRecordIdle: No transcript yet. Click Start Recognition and speak into the microphone.
asrDemo.transcribeNoResult: The local demo model did not recognize valid text. Try longer, clearer Mandarin recordings.
asrDemo.modelLoadFailed: Model loading failed. Please check your network and try again.
asrDemo.noValidSound: No valid sound recorded. Please try again.
asrDemo.recordDoneStatus: Recording complete. Generated {rate}k WAV, awaiting manual transcription.
asrDemo.recordDoneMessage: Recording complete. You can preview first, then click 'Transcribe Recording' to start recognition.
asrDemo.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support microphone recording. Please use the latest Chrome.
asrDemo.secureContextRequired: Voice recording requires access via localhost or https.
asrDemo.exportFailed: Export failed. Please try again later.
asrDemo.stopRecognitionFirst: Please stop current recognition before switching language.

gestureIntroPage.heroDesc: Powered by advanced hand feature extraction algorithms, the system tracks 21 hand keypoints in real time. It supports custom gesture learning and multi-hand detection, delivering precise visual feedback for classroom interaction.

interaction.title: Smart Courseware Control
interaction.desc: Teachers no longer need to rely on a mouse or clicker. By waving in the air, they can turn pages, zoom, and annotate key content more naturally during class.

accessibility.title: Sign Language Assistance
accessibility.desc: Bring technology into special education. Convert sign language into text or speech in real time and build a more accessible communication bridge.

virtualLab.title: Virtual Experiment Interaction
virtualLab.desc: In virtual laboratories, natural gestures can simulate delicate actions such as grabbing tools or pouring liquid, offering immersive operation without expensive equipment.

gestureExperience.mergedDesc: This page merges recognition and learning, so you can collect gestures while detecting them in real time.
